---
title: "Consult a Digital Research Specialist"
subtitle: "For help and advice in applying digital skills to your research"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    echo: false
    keep-hidden: true
    code-tools: false
    css:
      - index-header.css
---

::: consultation-button-container
[Request a consultation](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfZzkuJIe5j5dADrvhOsB_CILZ_QExxxFESWph_69tGfLZw4Q/viewform?embedded=true){.consultation-button .external target="_self"}
:::

[{{< fa solid puzzle-piece >}}]{style="display: none;"}

```{=html}
<div id="consult-cards">

<div class="consult-card">
  <div class="icon">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-puzzle-piece"></i>
  </div>
  <h3>Tackle Analytical Problems</h3>
  <p>Get fresh perspectives on complex data analysis and research methodology.</p>
</div>

<div class="consult-card">
  <div class="icon">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-code"></i>
  </div>
  <h3>Debug Your Code</h3>
  <p>Resolve coding issues and learn best practices for research software development.</p>
</div>

<div class="consult-card">
  <div class="icon">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-chart-line"></i>
  </div>
  <h3>Improve Data Visualization</h3>
  <p>Create compelling visualizations that effectively communicate your research findings.</p>
</div>

<div class="consult-card">
  <div class="icon">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-database"></i>
  </div>
  <h3>Manage Research Data</h3>
  <p>Design effective strategies for organizing, storing, and sharing your research data.</p>
</div>

<div class="consult-card">
  <div class="icon">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-laptop-code"></i>
  </div>
  <h3>Choose the Right Tools</h3>
  <p>Find the most appropriate software and platforms for your research workflows.</p>
</div>

<div class="consult-card">
  <div class="icon">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-rocket"></i>
  </div>
  <h3>Accelerate Your Project</h3>
  <p>Get expert guidance to overcome technical obstacles and move your research forward.</p>
</div>

</div>
```
